subprocessors.name: AWS Key Management Service (KMS)
subprocessors.purpose: Envelope encryption of restricted-tier field values in audit rows. Key material never leaves KMS HSMs.
data_categories: encrypted data keys (not the plaintext values themselves)

subprocessors.name: AWS S3 + Glacier
subprocessors.purpose: Cold storage for audit rows past 365d hot window. Object Lock immutable retention for 7y regulatory floor.
data_categories: encrypted audit row bodies (envelope-encrypted via KMS)
